title: RankSpoof
description: A mod to spoof your Hypixel Rank
body: # `RankSpoof` A mod to spoof your Hypixel Rank. Available for both [Forge 1.8.9](https://modrinth.com/mod/rankspoof/version/v1.1.2) (`v1` legacy) and [Fabric 1.21.10+](https://modrinth.com/mod/rankspoof/version/v2.3.0) (`v2` modern). Both versions are updated & maintained alongside each other and provide equivalent functionality. For legacy (`v1`), run `/rankspoof`, and for modern (`v2`), use [`Mod Menu ↗`](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to access the configuration GUI. --- Based on/inspired by [`CustomRankUpdated ↗`](https://www.chattriggers.com/modules/v/CustomRankUpdated) by Alexandra for ChatTriggers (which is an updated version of [`CustomRank ↗`](https://www.chattriggers.com/modules/v/CustomRank) by Heknon).
